Protocol Buffers schemas, build script, and configuration script for the 'nanopb' component.

## Folders
- **[nanopb](nanopb/README.md)**: Protocol Buffers schemas and build script for compiling `.proto` files into a static library.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration script for the 'nanopb' component in the Pebble firmware.
